---
name: Content Issue
about: Report incorrect definitions, missing terms, or citation issues
title: "[CONTENT] "
labels: content
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Issue Type
- [ ] Incorrect definition
- [ ] Missing term
- [ ] Outdated citation
- [ ] Wrong category
- [ ] Formula error

## Term (if applicable)
Which term is affected?

## Category
e.g., MEAL, Gender, Research Methods, Development Economics, Governance, Climate

## Description
What's wrong and what should it be?

## Source
Authoritative source for the correction (e.g., OECD-DAC, UNDP, World Bank).
